commit.message:
LU-10391 revert: "lnet: update ping to handle multiple NIDs"

This reverts commit c384a39d2889e93229813a204f7de5ca5f6bd142.
This is causing regular failures in sanity-lnet test_253.

Change-Id: Ia8817c88c80ab6cc0d4556530dd1a2a8ed601193
Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-lnet,sanity-lnet
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-lnet,sanity-lnet
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-lnet,sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
